commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Bow down your ear to me; deliver me speedily: be my strong rock, for a house of defense to save me. Augustine of Hippo 3. "Bend down Thine ear unto Me" (ver. Hear Me in My humiliation, nigh at hand unto Me. "Make haste to deliver Me. " Defer not to the end of the world, as with all who believe on Me, My separation from sinners. "Be unto Me a God who protecteth Me. " Be unto Me God, and Protector. "And a house of refuge, that Thou mayest save Me. " And as a house, wherein taking refuge I may be saved.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
A God. Hebrew, "a rock of strength. "Septuagint, "a God who holdeth his shield over me "uperaspisten. (Haydock)
Refuge. Hebrew, "fortress. "(Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
